input.article: How the City Lost $30 Million in Federal Housing Grants
input.what_happened: The article stated that the city had failed to spend $30 million in federal housing grants before the deadline. The correct amount was $23 million. An additional $7 million was spent but not properly reported to HUD, which led to the discrepancy in the federal audit.
The article misspelled the name of landscape architect Maria Fernandez as Maria Hernandez.

input.article: EU Commission Opens Investigation into Tech Giant's Tax Arrangements
input.what_happened: Since publication, the European Commission announced on March 15, 2026, that it has concluded its investigation and ordered the company to repay €2.1 billion in back taxes to Ireland. The company has stated it will appeal the decision to the EU General Court.
